title: UZSPACE Water Bottle 1l with Handle - BPA Free Drinking Bottles for Adults - Clear Water Bottle with Capacity Scale - Leakproof Gym Bottles - Ideal for Sports or Fitness & Outdoors Oak Brown
features: Healthy & Durable: Made of quality food-grade and environment-friendly plastic - Tritan, UZSPACE sports water bottle is safe and non-toxic. Tritan is 100% BPA-free and odorless, which is safe for you. In addition tritan water bottle is not only highly impact-resistant and drop-proof, but also highly transparent, allowing you to easily track your daily water intake with the thoughtfully designed capacity scale

Thoughtful Design: First with one-hand opening mechanism and a flip-top lid, you can just press the button of UZSPACE clear water bottle when you want to rehydrate. No more struggling with twist caps! Second the drinking spout contours to your lips for drip-free drinking, a vent on the lid ensures a consistent flow. Finally its ergonomic handle makes this big water bottle easy to carry or hang

Triple Leakproof System: With a safety lock, a silicone seal and silicone stoppers, our gym water bottle is 100% leakproof. Whether in rapid motion or lying in your backpack, this water bottle won't open accidentally or leak, keeping your bag’s contents completely dry. Also we provide a set of extra sealing rings for you to replace to extend the service life of this daily water intake bottle

Big Capacity & Easy to clean: This 1 litre water bottle (1050ml) is practical. Its wide mouth makes it easy to add ice, juice and all types of beverages, and it’s even suitable for carbonated drinks. Also UZSPACE large water bottle is designed for easy hand washing and is also dishwasher safe

Ideal Gift Choice & Multi-Use: This gym water bottle features a modern design and comes in elegant gift packaging, making it the great gift for friends, family and lover. And truly a reusable drinking bottle for the whole family. UZSPACE personalised water bottle is the great companion for work, fitness, sports or travel use. And it fits most backpack/bike/car bottle holders (80mm diameter)
